en: The Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me, because the LORD has anointed me to bring good news to the poor; he has sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to those who are bound;
zh: 主耶和華的靈在我身上， 因為耶和華膏了我， 叫我傳福音給困苦的人； 差遣我去醫治傷心的人， 向被擄的宣告自由， 向被囚的宣告釋放；

en: to proclaim the year of the LORD's favor, and the day of vengeance of our God; to comfort all who mourn;
zh: 宣告耶和華悅納人的禧年， 和我們的 神報仇的日子； 安慰悲哀的人，

en: to grant to those who mourn in Zion- to give them a beautiful headdress instead of ashes, the oil of gladness instead of mourning, the garment of praise instead of a faint spirit; that they may be called oaks of righteousness, the planting of the LORD, that he may be glorified.
zh: 為錫安悲哀的人穿上裝飾， 賜給他們華冠代替灰塵， 喜樂油代替悲哀， 讚美衣代替沮喪的靈， 他們必稱為公義的橡樹， 是耶和華栽種的，好使他自己得著榮耀。

en: They shall build up the ancient ruins; they shall raise up the former devastations; they shall repair the ruined cities, the devastations of many generations.
zh: 他們必重建久已廢棄的荒場， 建立先前荒涼之地； 重修荒廢了的城鎮， 就是歷代荒涼之處。

en: Strangers shall stand and tend your flocks; foreigners shall be your plowmen and vinedressers;
zh: 那時，外人要服事你們，牧放你們的羊群， 外族人要作你們的農夫和葡萄園丁。

en: but you shall be called the priests of the LORD; they shall speak of you as the ministers of our God; you shall eat the wealth of the nations, and in their glory you shall boast.
zh: 至於你們，卻要稱為耶和華的祭司， 人必稱你們為我們 神的僕人； 你們要享用列國的財富， 因得著他們的榮耀而誇耀。

en: Instead of your shame there shall be a double portion; instead of dishonor they shall rejoice in their lot; therefore in their land they shall possess a double portion; they shall have everlasting joy.
zh: 你們必得加倍的分，代替你們所受的羞愧， 他們因自己所得的分而歡呼，代替羞辱， 所以在他們的境內，他們必擁有加倍的產業， 他們必有永遠的喜樂。

en: For I the LORD love justice; I hate robbery and wrong; I will faithfully give them their recompense, and I will make an everlasting covenant with them.
zh: 因為我耶和華喜愛公平， 恨惡不義的搶奪； 我要憑真理賞賜他們， 與他們立永遠的約。

en: Their offspring shall be known among the nations, and their descendants in the midst of the peoples; all who see them shall acknowledge them, that they are an offspring the LORD has blessed.
zh: 他們的後裔必在列國中被人認識， 他們的子孫在萬民中也必這樣； 看見他們的， 都必承認他們是耶和華賜福的後裔。

en: I will greatly rejoice in the LORD; my soul shall exult in my God, for he has clothed me with the garments of salvation; he has covered me with the robe of righteousness, as a bridegroom decks himself like a priest with a beautiful headdress, and as a bride adorns herself with her jewels.
zh: 我因耶和華大大歡喜， 我的心靠著我的 神快樂， 因為他給我穿上救恩的衣服， 給我披上公義的外袍， 好像新郎戴上華冠， 又像新娘佩戴裝飾。

en: For as the earth brings forth its sprouts, and as a garden causes what is sown in it to sprout up, so the Lord GOD will cause righteousness and praise to sprout up before all the nations.
zh: 地怎樣發生苗芽， 園子怎樣使所種的生長起來， 主耶和華也必怎樣使公義和讚美， 在萬國之前生長出來。
